headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -146.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 955% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 174 quotes, heavily skewed toward strong intensity (147 strong vs. only 27 moderate/mild) - people are really fired up today.

• This puts frustrations in the upper tier of the 142-day range, though still below the peak of 164.5.

• Fears improved notably from yesterday's low while optimism remains near its historical bottom.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
